buildCommand: npm --prefix apps/web run build && cp -R apps/web/public/. apps/web/.vista/ && cp apps/web/.vista/client.css apps/web/.vista/styles.css
installCommand: npm --prefix packages/vista install --no-package-lock --include=dev --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix apps/web install --no-package-lock --include=dev --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund
